chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 727 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection Nos. 1 & 12 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.4125/2022 19.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Pirzada, advocate for respondent Concurrent findings against the applicant are subject matter of this reference pending since 2022. Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. The instant Special Customs Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
